race.description: Ladbrokes Mates Mode Qtis 3YO Bm65 Handicap
race.comment: POINT VEGA (3) was well supported when at the races for the first time and didn't let backers down with an impressive Sunny Coast victory. Winning hoop Bayliss retains the ride and should be going very close again. CARBONARA (2) is a consistent conveyance who boasts a win over this track and trip and gets some weight off with the 2kg claim. Top-three credentials. CRYPTIC BEAUTY (5) strips fitter third-up from the break and may earn some minor money. SHADWELL LANE (9) showed improvement in the last-start fourth and could be reaching peak fitness now.
